currentLinkedIn.headline: Product Manager at Meridian Systems | Berlin
currentLinkedIn.about: I bridge engineering and business goals by keeping the backlog honest and the metrics visible. Based in Berlin, working across European enterprise clients.

experience.title: Product Manager
bullets: Managed a 60-item backlog for a compliance automation product serving 200+ EU enterprise clients
Coordinated quarterly releases across three engineering teams in Berlin, Warsaw, and Lisbon

experience.title: Associate Product Manager
bullets: Wrote user stories and acceptance criteria for a data-integration platform used by 50 mid-market companies
Facilitated bi-weekly stakeholder reviews; maintained product changelog and release notes
